_instructions: Complete project brief for Infinite Global Recruitment. This is the single source of truth for all page generation.

project.name: Infinite Global Recruitment
project.description: Infinite Global Recruitment is an education consultancy and recruitment support firm. We guide students seeking to study abroad (UK, Canada, USA, Australia, Europe) through the full application process, and support job seekers with skill migration guidance, profile preparation, and employer coordination.
project.target_audience: Students aged 18-35 seeking study abroad opportunities and job seekers aged 25-45 looking for international career pathways. Based primarily in Sri Lanka and South Asia.

branding.notes: Logo features an infinity symbol — left loop has ocean/water texture (teal/cyan), right loop is metallic gold with 'R' inside. Text is dark navy. The color palette is derived from this: Navy = trust/authority, Gold = premium/success, Teal = global reach/freshness.

pages.name: Home
pages.description: Conversion-focused landing page. Two clear pathways (Students vs Job Seekers), trust builders, process overview, teasers for both services, testimonials, and a final CTA banner.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Trust-building page. Who we are, mission/values, what makes us different, process promise, optional team section, and CTA banner.

pages.name: Education
pages.description: Single page covering all 5 study destinations (UK, Canada, USA, Australia, Europe) using tabs/accordion. Each region has overview, benefits, requirements, timeline, documents, FAQ, and CTA. General education process section included.

pages.name: Recruitment / Job Seekers
pages.description: Single page covering recruitment services, process steps, support details, fees (embedded), disclaimer, job seeker application form, and FAQs.

pages.name: Book a Consultation / Apply
pages.description: Main conversion hub. Two application pathways (Student vs Job Seeker), consultation request form, FAQs about the process, and contact quick options.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Simple contact page with contact info, optional contact form, office hours, and optional embedded map.

shared_elements.header: Sticky header with navigation: Home | About Us | Education | Recruitment/Job Seekers | Book a Consultation/Apply | Contact. Sticky CTA button: 'Apply Now' or 'Book a Consultation'.
shared_elements.footer: Quick links to all 6 pages, contact details, social icons, legal links (Privacy Policy + Terms & Conditions).
shared_elements.cta_section: Reuse consistent CTA banner across pages for visual consistency.

education.tagline: Your Study Abroad Journey Starts Here
education.description: Expert guidance for students seeking to study in the UK, Canada, USA, Australia, and Europe. From eligibility assessment to pre-departure support.

destinations.overview: World-class universities, shorter course durations, post-study work opportunities.
benefits: Internationally recognized degrees
1-3 year course durations (shorter than many countries)
Post-Study Work Visa (Graduate Route — 2 years)
Multicultural environment and vibrant student life
Scholarships and financial aid options available

destinations.overview: Affordable tuition, post-graduation work permits, and clear pathways to permanent residency.
benefits: Affordable tuition compared to US/UK
Post-Graduation Work Permit (PGWP — up to 3 years)
Pathways to Permanent Residency (PR)
Safe, multicultural, high quality of life
Co-op and internship programs available

destinations.overview: Home to the world's top-ranked universities with diverse programs and research opportunities.
benefits: World's highest-ranked universities
Wide range of courses and specializations
Optional Practical Training (OPT — up to 3 years for STEM)
Campus employment and assistantship opportunities
Strong alumni networks globally

destinations.overview: High-quality education, excellent student support services, and post-study work rights.
benefits: Globally recognized qualifications
Post-Study Work Visa (2-4 years depending on qualification)
Part-time work rights during study (48 hrs/fortnight)
Strong support services for international students
Beautiful lifestyle and diverse culture

destinations.overview: Affordable or tuition-free education in many countries, rich cultural experiences, and Schengen access.
benefits: Low or zero tuition in many countries (Germany, Norway, etc.)
Programs taught in English increasingly available
Rich cultural and travel experiences (Schengen area)
Strong industry connections and internship options
Diverse range of specialized programs
requirements: Financial proof (blocked account in some countries)

process_steps.title: Eligibility Check
process_steps.description: We assess your academic background, test scores, and goals to identify the best options.

process_steps.title: Free Consultation
process_steps.description: Discuss your study plans, budget, and preferred destinations with our expert advisors.

process_steps.title: Document Preparation
process_steps.description: We guide you through gathering and preparing all required documents.

process_steps.title: Application Submission
process_steps.description: We handle your university applications and track progress on your behalf.

process_steps.title: Offer & Pre-Departure
process_steps.description: Receive your offer, complete visa formalities, and get pre-departure briefing.

recruitment.description: Professional support for skilled workers seeking international career opportunities. From profile assessment to employer coordination and pre-departure preparation.
support_includes: Job matching support and employer coordination

process_steps.title: Submit Your Profile
process_steps.description: Fill in your details and upload your CV for initial review.

process_steps.title: Profile Review
process_steps.description: Our team reviews your qualifications, experience, and suitability.

process_steps.title: Matching & Coordination
process_steps.description: We match your profile with suitable opportunities and coordinate with employers.

process_steps.title: Interview & Offer
process_steps.description: Attend interviews, receive guidance, and work toward securing an offer.

process_steps.title: Documentation & Departure
process_steps.description: Complete all documentation and receive pre-departure support.

recruitment.disclaimer: Please note: Final job offers, work permits, and visa outcomes are determined by employers and relevant government authorities. Infinite Global Recruitment provides guidance and coordination support only. We do not guarantee specific job placements or visa approvals.

general.q: What services does Infinite Global Recruitment offer?
general.a: We provide study abroad consultancy for students (UK, Canada, USA, Australia, Europe) and recruitment/skill migration support for job seekers.
Simply fill out the application form on our website or book a free consultation. Our team will review your profile and contact you within 1-2 business days.

general.q: Is there a fee for the initial consultation?
general.a: Initial consultations for education guidance are typically free. For recruitment services, please contact us for current fee details.

general.q: How long does the process take?
general.a: Timelines vary by destination and service. Education applications typically take 4-12 weeks. Recruitment timelines depend on employer processes.

general.q: Do you guarantee visa approval or job placement?
general.a: No. Final decisions are made by universities, employers, and immigration authorities. We provide expert guidance and support to maximize your chances.

general.q: Can I apply for multiple countries/destinations?
general.a: Yes! Our team can guide you through applications to multiple destinations simultaneously.

education.q: Which countries can I study in?
education.a: We currently support applications to the UK, Canada, USA, Australia, and Europe (Germany, France, Netherlands, etc.).

education.q: Do I need IELTS to study abroad?
education.a: Most countries require English language proficiency. IELTS is widely accepted, but TOEFL, PTE, and Duolingo English Test may also be valid depending on the university.

education.q: Can you help with scholarship applications?
education.a: Yes, our consultants can identify scholarship opportunities and guide you through the application process.
Generally: valid passport, academic transcripts, English test scores, statement of purpose, financial proof, and reference letters. Requirements vary by country.
We provide comprehensive visa guidance including document preparation, application support, and interview coaching.

education.q: What happens after I receive an offer?
education.a: We assist with acceptance, visa application, accommodation guidance, and pre-departure orientation.

recruitment.q: What types of jobs do you help with?
recruitment.a: We support a range of skilled occupations including healthcare, engineering, IT, hospitality, construction trades, and more.

recruitment.q: Do you charge the job seeker or the employer?
recruitment.a: Please contact us for our current fee structure. We are transparent about all costs upfront.

recruitment.q: How long does the recruitment process take?
recruitment.a: Timelines vary depending on the destination, employer, and visa processing. Our team will give you a realistic estimate during consultation.
No. We provide profile optimization, coordination, and support, but final hiring decisions are made by employers.

recruitment.q: What if my profile isn't suitable?
recruitment.a: We will provide honest feedback and suggest steps to improve your profile (additional certifications, experience, language skills, etc.).

recruitment.q: Do you help with visa and travel?
recruitment.a: Yes, we provide documentation guidance, visa support, and pre-departure briefing to help you prepare for your move.

legal.disclaimer: Infinite Global Recruitment provides consultancy and coordination services only. Final outcomes including university admissions, job offers, and visa approvals are determined by the respective institutions, employers, and government authorities. We do not guarantee specific results.

student_application.name: Student Application / Eligibility Form
student_application.on_submit: Thank you for your application! Our team will review your details and contact you within 1-2 business days.

job_seeker_application.name: Job Seeker Application Form
job_seeker_application.on_submit: Thank you for submitting your profile! Our recruitment team will review your details and reach out to you within 2-3 business days.

consultation_request.name: Consultation Request Form
consultation_request.on_submit: Thank you for your consultation request! We will contact you within 1 business day to confirm your appointment.
